🌸

Kashmala Arshad

Computer Engineering student at UET Faisalabad, Pakistan. I love coding, solving problems, and building things. This blog is my little corner of the internet where I share my journey! ✨

👩‍🎓 Education

Currently in my 2nd semester of Computer Engineering at UET Faisalabad. My subjects include:

  • Digital Logic Design (DLD)
  • Object Oriented Programming in C#
  • Database Systems
  • Calculus
  • Communication Skills

💻 Skills

Python C# MySQL HTML & CSS GitHub Jekyll Digital Logic Design

🚀 Current Goals

  • Complete Python Developer Internship at Arch Technologies
  • Build my personal portfolio website
  • Learn AI/ML basics
  • Grow my GitHub profile
  • Work on StitchCraft FSD & SeedHub PK ideas

💗 About This Blog

This blog is where I document my CE journey — lab tasks, weekly learnings, internship experiences, and random thoughts about life as a CS student in Pakistan. I hope it inspires other students like me! 🌱
